## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example/template
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual editor/runtime check, if relevant

## Notes

Call out breaking changes, follow-up work, or areas needing reviewer attention.
